name: 10p14_PFKFB3_SD
description: 10p14 segmental duplication interval covering PFKFB3 (6-phosphofructo-2-kinase) and adjacent CUGBP2/GATA3 flank. Contains short interchromosomal SDs paired with the PFKFB-family paralogs (PFKFB1/2/4) on chr3, chr10 and chrX.

architecture.internal_structure: Family-internal SDs of 5-20 kb at ~90-95% identity to PFKFB1/2/4; mostly stable single-copy at this locus.
